invariant_usdcBacksMerkleLeaves().details: Shield fee is inclusive: amount = base + fee. base goes to pool, fee goes to treasury.      So pool_balance + treasury_balance >= sum of all shield amounts.

targetSenders().details: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

invariant_insertionCountConsistency().notice: Insertion count consistency — ghost matches contract state

invariant_merkleRootInHistory().notice: Current merkle root is always in rootHistory for current tree

invariant_usdcBacksMerkleLeaves().notice: USDC conservation: pool balance + treasury fees >= total shielded
